Broken but honest

This legacy page never closes its tags & uses uppercase elements. It survives because browsers are forgiving, and PageSkim must be equally forgiving when reading it.

First section

Paragraph one of the first section talks about resilience at some length so that extraction has something to work with.

Paragraph two with bold and italics that overlap incorrectly.
a lonely layout cell

Second section

The second section has no id attribute on its heading and that must be fine too.
